form.formComment: Placed last time (16.54) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 6 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from seven starts. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Sent out long odds last time but rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 2.5 lengths second (16.31) over 275m at this track. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.
